'''Scott Summers''' is a [[mutant]] and member of the [[X-Men]] known as '''Cyclops''', who has the power to fire optic energy blasts from his eyes, the trajectory of which can be controlled with use of a specialized [[Cyclops' Visor|visor]].

==Biography==
''To be added''

==Powers and Abilities==
===Powers===
*'''Mutant Physiology''': As a [[mutant]], Cyclops possesses unique DNA structure, different from [[humans]], which grants him superhuman abilities.
**'''Optic Blasts:''' Cyclops can project an immense amount of concentrated concussive force from his eyes. 

===Abilities===
''To be added''

==Trivia==
*In the comics, Cyclops is one of the founding members and a frequent field leader of the [[X-Men]]. He is also [[Jean Grey]]'s husband.
*During the end credits sequence of the ''[[She-Hulk: Attorney at Law]]'' episode ''[[Mean, Green, and Straight Poured into These Jeans]]'', artwork of [[Augustus Pugliese]] showcasing his sneaker collection to [[Nikki Ramos]] features a sneaker with the colors of the classic Cyclops Suit.

==Behind the Scenes==
*Cyclops in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] is the second live-action incarnation of the character, following an incarnation portrayed by [[James Marsden]], {{WPS|Tim Pocock}} and {{WPS|Tye Sheridan}}.
